## Type of change

- [ ] New question(s) in `content/questions.json`
- [ ] New tool(s) in `content/tools-catalogue.json`
- [ ] New recommendation(s) in `content/recommendations.json`
- [ ] Narrative update in `content/narrative-snippets.json`
- [ ] Bug fix (JavaScript or HTML)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Content changes checklist (for JSON edits)

- [ ] JSON is valid (no syntax errors)
- [ ] Entries conform to the schema in `content/schemas/`
- [ ] Question text is plain English with no unexplained jargon
- [ ] Answer options describe concrete, observable states
- [ ] Tool descriptions are honest — not marketing copy
- [ ] New IDs are unique within the file

## Code changes checklist (for JS/HTML edits)

- [ ] No new external network requests introduced
- [ ] Keyboard navigation still works
- [ ] No new accessibility regressions
- [ ] Output remains deterministic (same input → same output)
